# activationState

**Instance Property**

The activation state of the pass.

## Declaration

```swift
required ApplePayPaymentPassActivationState activationState;
```

## Discussion

The activation state is of type [doc://com.apple.applepayontheweb/documentation/ApplePayontheWeb/ApplePayPaymentPassActivationState].

## Activation State

- **ApplePayPaymentPassActivationState**: Payment pass activation states.
